evals.expected_output: An audit listing specific issues, followed by clean replacement code using a proper VIZ_PALETTE, standardized dataset builder function, formatted tooltips, styled legend, graceful empty/error states, and correct container CSS.

evals.prompt: I'm building a dark-themed dashboard and need a new Chart.js bar chart showing how many cards I'm missing per MTG set. The sets are: Mirage (247 missing), Visions (122 missing), Weatherlight (119 missing), Ice Age (89 missing), The Dark (45 missing), Homelands (38 missing). Make it look professional with proper dark-theme styling.
evals.expected_output: Professional bar chart implementation with VIZ_PALETTE colors, formatted tooltips, no raw numbers, responsive container, empty/error states, and consistent styling matching a dark UI.

evals.prompt: My Chart.js chart tooltips show numbers like '$1234.5678900000001' and the legend text is getting cut off on mobile. The chart also just disappears when there's no data instead of showing a message. Fix all three issues and clean up the overall chart quality.
evals.expected_output: Fixed tooltip formatting using toLocaleString with proper decimal places, legend with overflow handling, proper empty state implementation with a user-friendly message, and overall code quality improvements following viz best practices.
